message:
feat(cli): add evidence command for skill provenance tracking

Implements ms evidence subcommands for viewing and managing skill
provenance evidence, linking skills to their source CASS sessions:
- evidence show <skill-id>: display evidence index for a skill
- evidence list: list all evidence records with filtering
- evidence export: export provenance graph (JSON/DOT formats)

Supports both human-readable and robot (JSON) output modes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
